minimal.python:
# Spaghetti Architect — generated module: allowlist_L32
# Deliberately redundant, but syntactically correct and crash-free.

# --- run fixtures (inputs) ---
allow_list = [2, 5, 14, 23, 27, 34, 40, 42, 46, 50, 56, 58, 64, 78, 79, 84, 87, 90, 91, 92, 93, 95, 104, 119, 126, 128, 130, 131, 139, 142, 144, 152]
probe = 87

# MEMBERSHIP_CHECK: is_allowed = probe in allow_list
is_allowed = False
try:
    if allow_list is not None:
        # SPAGH_001/006/008: manual index loop instead of `in`
        _idx = 0
        _n = len(allow_list)
        _match_flag = False
        while _idx < _n:
            if allow_list[_idx] == probe:
                _match_flag = True
            _idx = _idx + 1
        is_allowed = _match_flag
    else:
        is_allowed = False
except Exception:
    is_allowed = False
